title: Video Training
description: Let's start your video production training!

scenes.speech: Welcome to Video Dojo! You can become a movie director with just one smartphone! 🎬
scenes.title: Welcome to Video Dojo!
scenes.content: Video is a 'magic tool' that turns what you want to convey into images. Let's learn the three steps: planning, shooting, and editing!

scenes.speech: First, decide who you want to convey to, what you want to convey, and how you want to convey it!
scenes.title: Planning Training
scenes.content: Before making a video, write a 'planning document'. Even a 1-minute video requires planning!
scenes.highlight:
Three elements of a planning document:
Who  → Friends of the same age
What  → Introduction to your favorite game
Feeling → I want you to feel excited

scenes.speech: Garuru will teach you camera tips! Remember the rule of thirds!
scenes.title: Shooting Training
scenes.content: Divide the screen into thirds vertically and horizontally, and place important things at the intersections for a beautiful shot. This is the 'rule of thirds'!
scenes.highlight:
Three shooting tips:
① Be aware of the rule of thirds
② Light should come from in front of the face
③ Move the camera slowly

scenes.speech: Let's have AI create a video script for us!
scenes.title: AI Script Training
scenes.content: Try asking NotebookLM or Claude to 'create a script for a 1-minute video'. What kind of script will it create?
scenes.highlight:
Example prompt:
'Create a script for a 1-minute video introducing your favorite game to elementary school students. Use 5 lines of dialogue.'

scenes.speech: You can also use AI to automatically generate videos with Veo!
scenes.title: AI Video Generation Training
scenes.content: Try using Veo, an AI that creates videos from text! Just enter words and it will create a moving image.
scenes.highlight:
Let's try:
Ask Veo to 'create a video of a energetic kangaroo jumping in a bamboo forest'!

scenes.title: Cut Pacing
scenes.content: Long static shots get boring. Change angle or visual every 3–5 seconds and viewers stay glued.
scenes.highlight:
Cut tips:
- Every 3–5s
- Change angle
- Change size

scenes.title: Pick the BGM
scenes.content: Bright music = energy, quiet music = emotion, fast tempo = adventure. Matching footage to feeling is the pro touch.
scenes.highlight:
BGM pick:
- Match tempo
- Match emotion
- Soft on lyrics

scenes.speech: Video training complete! Share your video on Slack! 🎉
scenes.title: Training Complete!
scenes.content: You've mastered video production using planning, shooting, and AI! Show your completed video to everyone!
